chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Misc.A.No.S-368 of 2017. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections “A” 2. For hearing of case. 29.10.2018 Mr. Mazhar Ali Mangan, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ashiq Ali Jatoi, Advocate for proposed accused. Mr.Raja Imtiaz Ali Solangi, A.P.G ~-~-~-~-~-~-~-~-~ The applicant by way of instant Crl.Misc.Applicatoin u/s.561-A Cr.PC, has impugned order dated 25.10.2017, passed by leaned 2nd Additional Session Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Qamber, whereby the application of the applicant filed u/s.22-A & 22-B Cr.PC for issuance of direction against SHO P.S, Nasirabad, to record her statement u/s.154 Cr.PC in respect of unnatural death of her son Imran allegedly at the hands of proposed accused after his formal arrest in a murder case, was dismissed. It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge/Ex- Officio Justice of Peace, Qamber, has dismissed the application of the applicant without lawful justification ignoring the fact that the offence alleged was cognizable in its’ nature. Learned counsel for the proposed accused and learned A.P.G have sought for dismissal of the instant application by contending that deceased Imran has died of road accident and the applicant in order to satisfy her grudge with the proposed accused is attempting to involve them in a false case. I have considered the above arguments and perused the record. Deceased Imran as per postmortem report has died of unnatural death on account of sustaining fire shot injuries. The allegation requires probe.

Deceased Imran as per postmortem report has died of unnatural death on account of sustaining fire shot injuries. The allegation requires probe. In that situation, the learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Qamber, ought not to have refused recording statement of the applicant u/s.154 Cr.PC by making an observation with regard to very merits of the case. In these circumstances, the impugned order is set aside. Consequently, SHO, P.S, Nasirabad, is directed to record statement of the applicant u/s.154 Cr.PC for further action in accordance with law. Needless to state that if the proposed accused are carrying feeling that they are being involved in a criminal case falsely by the applicant then they may prove their innocence before the police by joining the investigation. The instant Crl.Misc.Applicatoin is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE.
